title: Kolleru Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Kolleru Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Kolleru Bird Sanctuary is a sanctuary in Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Kolleru Bird Sanctuary is a sanctuary in Andhra Pradesh, India. It covers 673 square kilometers. It was established in November 1999, under the Wildlife Protection Act of 1972. The sanctuary protects part of the Kolleru Lake wetland, which gained Ramsar Convention for International importance in 2002.

topPlaces.name: Pydichintapadu
topPlaces.description: Pydichintapadu is a village in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Eluru mandal of Eluru revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Gudivakalanka
topPlaces.description: Gudivakalanka is a village in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Eluru mandal of Eluru revenue division..The nearest train station is Kaikolur (KKLR) located at a distance of 8.9 km.

topPlaces.name: Kolleru Lake
topPlaces.description: Kolleru Lake is one of the largest freshwater lakes in India and forms the largest shallow freshwater lake in Asia (with 245 km2 of lake area and 302 km2 of total Ramsar designated wetland). 15 kilometers away from Eluru and 65 km from Rajamahendravaram, the lake is located between the Krishna and Godavari river deltas.

topPlaces.name: Kokkirailanka
topPlaces.description: Kokkirailanka is a village in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Eluru mandal of Eluru revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kalakurru
topPlaces.description: Kalakurru is a village in Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Eluru mandal of Eluru revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Kavuluru, Nallajerla mandal
topPlaces.description: Kavuluru is a village in the Nallajerla Mandal, East Godavari district of Andhra Pradesh in India.

topPlaces.name: Prathikollanka
topPlaces.description: Prathikollanka is a village in Eluru district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India. It is 22 km from the city of Eluru, the headquarters of West Godavari Dist.

topPlaces.name: Manuru
topPlaces.description: Manuru is a village in the Eluru district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in the Eluru mandal of the Eluru revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kolleru Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kolleru Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kolleru Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kolleru Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kolleru Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kolleru Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kolleru Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kolleru Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pydichintapadu, Gudivakalanka, Kolleru Lake, Kokkirailanka, Kalakurru.
